title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.

title: Beef Tacos
summary: Crispy taco shells filled with seasoned ground beef, lettuce, cheese, and salsa.

title: Margherita Pizza
summary: A traditional Italian pizza topped with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil.

title: Caesar Salad
summary: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed with Caesar dressing, croutons, and parmesan cheese.

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
summary: A decadent chocolate cake with a warm, gooey molten chocolate center.
